channel.title: Comments on: Shmaltz Brewing: HE’BREW Jewbelation 15, Ep. 178
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Sara
item.dc:creator: Sara
item.description:
Many, many thanks to you guys for this amazing vlog review!
Cheers!
Sara Marketing Coordinator Shmaltz Brewing
item.content:encoded:
Many, many thanks to you guys for this amazing vlog review!

Cheers!

Sara
Marketing Coordinator
Shmaltz Brewing
